prepR4pcm 0.3.0
  • Reference
    • Getting Started
    • Bird Trait Workflow
  • Changelog

Package index

Core Reconciliation

Match species names between datasets and/or trees.

reconcile_tree()
Reconcile species names between a dataset and a phylogenetic tree
reconcile_data()
Reconcile species names between two datasets
reconcile_to_trees()
Reconcile one dataset against multiple phylogenetic trees
reconcile_trees()
Reconcile tip labels between two phylogenetic trees
reconcile_multi()
Reconcile multiple datasets against one phylogenetic tree

Apply & Export

Use reconciliation results to align data and trees.

reconcile_apply()
Apply a reconciliation to produce aligned data and tree
reconcile_merge()
Merge two reconciled datasets
reconcile_export()
Export reconciled data and tree to files

Diagnostics & Review

Inspect, visualise, and audit matching decisions.

reconcile_summary()
Generate a reconciliation summary report
reconcile_mapping()
Extract the mapping table from a reconciliation
reconcile_plot()
Plot reconciliation match composition
reconcile_suggest()
Suggest fuzzy matches for unresolved species
reconcile_diff()
Compare two reconciliation objects
reconcile_report()
Generate an HTML reconciliation report
reconcile_review()
Interactively review reconciliation matches

Overrides & Crosswalks

Manual corrections and taxonomy crosswalk integration.

reconcile_override()
Add a manual override to a reconciliation
reconcile_override_batch()
Apply multiple overrides to a reconciliation
reconcile_crosswalk()
Convert a taxonomy crosswalk to an overrides table

Advanced

Tree augmentation and split/lump detection.

reconcile_augment()
Add missing species to a phylogenetic tree
reconcile_splits_lumps()
Summarise splits and lumps for a reconciliation object

Utilities

pr_normalize_names()
Normalise scientific names
pr_extract_tips()
Extract tip labels from a tree

Data

Bundled example datasets and trees.

avonet_subset
AVONET morphological trait data (subset)
nesttrait_subset
Nest trait data (subset)
delhey_subset
Plumage lightness data (subset)
tree_jetz
Jetz (2012) phylogenetic tree (subset)
tree_clements25
Clements 2025 phylogenetic tree (subset)
crosswalk_birdlife_birdtree
BirdLife-BirdTree taxonomy crosswalk

On this page

Developed by Shinichi Nakagawa, Sergio Poo Hernandez.
